_comment: Phase-aware tool restrictions. 'advisory' produces warning systemMessage. 'restricted' will produce hard blocks in v2.8.0 (advisory-only in v2.7.0 MVP).

advisory.message: Code editing is not typical during spec authoring. Freeze specs and create a Work Order first.
Code creation is not typical during spec authoring. Freeze specs and create a Work Order first.
Code file creation via Bash is not typical during spec authoring.
Code review is for implementation phase, not spec authoring.
Module completion is for validation phase, not spec authoring.
Dependency checking is for implementation phase.
Code editing during planning phase. Create a Work Order and set to IN-PROGRESS first.
Code creation during planning phase. Create a Work Order and set to IN-PROGRESS first.
Code file creation via Bash during planning phase.
Creating new spec documents during implementation may indicate scope change. See change-control.md.
Editing specs during implementation may indicate scope change. See change-control.md.
Creating specs during implementation may indicate scope change. See change-control.md.
Code editing during validation. If a fix is needed, set the WO back to IN-PROGRESS first.
Code creation during validation. If new code is needed, set the WO back to IN-PROGRESS first.
Code file creation via Bash during validation phase.
Creating new spec documents during validation may indicate scope change.
Editing specs during validation. See change-control.md.
